parameters.query: SELECT pf.id, pf.lead_id, pf.transcript_text, pf.filename, lcm.lead_name, lcm.curators FROM processed_files pf LEFT JOIN lead_chat_mapping lcm ON lcm.lead_id = pf.lead_id WHERE COALESCE(pf.summary_sent, false) = false AND pf.transcript_text IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(pf.file_date, pf.completed_at::date, pf.created_at::date) = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY pf.lead_id

SELECT cs.lead_id, cs.source_type, cs.summary_text, cs.summary_date, lcm.lead_name, lcm.curators FROM client_summaries cs LEFT JOIN lead_chat_mapping lcm ON lcm.lead_id = cs.lead_id WHERE cs.summary_date = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY cs.lead_id, cs.source_type

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS prompts (name VARCHAR(100) PRIMARY KEY, prompt_text TEXT NOT NULL, last_result TEXT, updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), version INTEGER DEFAULT 1, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, created_by VARCHAR(100)); WITH prompt AS (SELECT prompt_text FROM prompts WHERE name = 'digest_prompt' AND is_active = true ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT prompt_text FROM prompt), '') AS prompt_text;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.GLM4_MODEL || 'claude-3-5-haiku-20241022', system: $json.systemPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.combined }], max_tokens: 1400 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ parse_mode: 'HTML', chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID || -1003872092456, text: $json.text, disable_web_page_preview: false }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE processed_files SET summary_text = $1, summary_sent = true WHERE id = ANY($2::int[])

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ parse_mode: 'HTML', chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID || -1003872092456, text: '📊 Дайджест ' + new Date().toLocaleDateString("ru-RU") + '\n\nСозвонов за день не было. Данные появятся после обработки записей.', disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}
